%title Piotr Kozicki
= Piotr Kozicki =
[[https://github.com/ofthegoats|GitHub]];
[[https://orcid.org/0009-0003-5730-6895|ORCID]];
[[https://www.linkedin.com/in/piotrkozicki|LinkedIn]]
----
  
{{file:images/resize_mugshot.jpeg|mugshot|style="width=10px"}}

M.Sc.R student at the University of Bristol in the
[[https://plrg-bristol.github.io/|Programming Languages Research Group]]
supervised by [[https://seis.bristol.ac.uk/~tz20861/|Dr. Alex Kavvos]].

My research interests are scattered around:
- (modal) logic and semantics
- (homotopy) type theory
- category theory and duality

== Publications ==

- [[https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06533|Relational Dualities and Bisimulation]] -
  Accepted for publication at FSCD'26

== Contact ==

`piotr dot kozicki at bristol dot ac dot uk`

81 Woodland Road, Bristol, BS8 1US, United Kingdom
